error.failedToBuildRoadmap: Oops! We couldn't build your learning path right now.
error.offlineLesson: You are offline and this lesson is not cached.
error.failedToLoadStudyGuide: Oops, we couldn't load your study guide. Let's try again! 🙈

keyExplanation: You are currently using your own Gemini API key. You have unlimited access directly from your browser.
starExplanation: Thank you for supporting us on GitHub! You have premium queries left on our server.
deleteCourseConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{title}}"? This action is absolute and irreversible.
noCoursesYet: No courses yet — create your first!

quotes.quote1: Learning is a beautiful journey, and you are doing amazing! 🌟
quotes.quote2: Every small step brings you closer to your big dreams. Keep shining! ✨
quotes.quote3: Your potential is endless. Let's learn something wonderful today! 📚
quotes.quote4: Errors are just happy little proofs that you are trying! 🧡
quotes.quote5: Mistakes help our brains grow bigger and stronger. You got this! 💪
quotes.quote6: Curiosity is the spark behind every great discovery. Keep exploring! 🧭

pickTopicToStart: Pick a Topic to Start Learning! 🚀
clickAnyLessonTopic: Click any lesson topic in your personalized roadmap on the left. Your companion tutor will formulate study notes, annotated code exercises, and friendly models.
createNewLearningAdventureDesc: What would you like to explore today? Your companion tutor will customize the perfect path.
topicSkillLabel: Topic or Skill you want to learn:
topicPlaceholder: e.g. Python Programming, UI Design, Photography...
pleaseWaitSecureConnection: Please wait while we establish your secure study connection.
waitSecureConnection: Please wait while we establish your secure study connection.
footerText: ZachCourse Companion Core • Powered by Warm Generative AI Guidance

toast.apiKeyQuotaExceededCheckYourUsageAtAistu: API Key is missing or invalid! Please provide a new key.
toast.couldntLoadYourCoursesPleaseRefresh: Couldn't load your courses — please refresh
toast.youAreOfflineAndThisCourseIsNotCached: You are offline and this course is not cached.
toast.roadmapSavedYourCourseIsReady: Roadmap saved! Your course is ready 🗺️
toast.offlineProgressSavedLocallyWillSyncWhenO: Offline — progress saved locally. Will sync when online! 🔄
toast.failedToDeletePleaseTryAgain: Failed to delete — please try again
toast.failedToTranslateRoadmap: Roadmap translation failed. Displaying the original English version.

addCourseLinkSyllabus: Add a course link or textbook syllabus (optional)
keepItUpCompleted: Keep it up! Completed {{completed}} of {{total}} topics so far.
writingStudyGuideDesc: Generating custom explanations, friendly real-world analogies, and safe examples to help you understand.
feelingConfidentLesson: Feeling confident about this lesson? Let's verify your retention!
submissionNotesPlaceholder: Link to your repo, live demo, or thoughts on the project...
toastPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
toastAgreeTerms: You must agree to the Terms of Service
toastTrySigningIn: Try signing in or reset your password.
toastEmailAlreadyRegisteredGeneric: This email is already registered — sign in instead.
toastPasswordTooWeak: Password is too weak — use 8+ chars with numbers
toastSomethingWentWrong: Something went wrong — please try again
toastResentVerificationInbox: A verification email was resent. Check your inbox.
toastCouldNotCreateAccount: Could not create account — try again
toastVerifyEmailFirst: Please go to your mailbox and verify your email before logging in.
checkEmailSubtitle: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please click the link in that email to activate your learning portal account.
cantFindEmail: Can't find the email? Check your spam folder, or make sure the email address was entered correctly.
iAgreeToTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
oauthFailedToast: OAuth authentication failed. Please try again or use another login method.
oauthFailedError: OAuth authentication failed. An account with this email may already exist under a different login method, or the connection was interrupted.
toastSignInFailedNoResponse: Sign in failed — no response from server
toastEmailNotVerified: We've sent a mail to your registered Email, please verify before first login
toastSignInFailedGeneric: Failed to sign in. Verify credentials.
apiKeyRequiredDesc: Visual Roadmaps use structured output generation to build complex graph paths. Add your Gemini API key to unlock this feature.
generateRoadmapDesc: Map out any learning journey from beginner to mastery.
whatToMaster: What do you want to master?
graphWillAppearHere: Your generated node graph will appear here.
noSavedRoadmaps: You don't have any saved roadmaps yet. Generate one to see it here!
selectRoadmapToViewGraph: Select a roadmap above to view its graph
deleteRoadmapConfirmDesc1: Are you sure you want to permanently delete
deleteRoadmapConfirmDesc2: ? This action is absolute and irreversible. All nodes, edges, milestones, and completed node progress indicators will be permanently lost.

graph.clickToJump: 💡 Click the map to jump around

toastSelectCourseOrRoadmap: Please select a Course or a Roadmap
title: Guided Tours
subtitle: Track your progress, consistency, and mastery across all courses.
createClassroomHint: * At least one Course or Roadmap must be selected. Enrolled students will automatically clone and study this content.
emptyState: You aren't in any cohorts yet.
noStudentsJoined: No students have joined this classroom yet.
tutorFormulating: Tutor is formulating your quiz questions... 🧠
tutorFormulatingSub: Designing adaptive choices to measure conceptual understanding, rather than syntax retrieval.
startLessonToPracticeDesc: Select any lesson from your active Roadmap, click Take Quick Quiz in the lesson study guide view, and test your knowledge here!
invalidCertDesc: The certificate ID you are trying to access does not exist or has been modified.
bgPlaceholder: e.g. I know basic HTML/CSS but no JavaScript. I learn best by building small projects rather than reading theory.
companionInstructions: Click any of these helper templates to ask me questions about your current study material:
analogyPromptText: Can you give me an intuitive real-world analogy for this lesson?
simplePromptText: Can you break down this topic in much simpler terms for me?
projectPromptText: What is a fun interactive mini-project I can build to practice this topic?
noTopicActive: No topic active—select a lesson in the roadmap tab to focus our questions.
tutorSubtitle: Ready to chat and help you understand!
inputPlaceholder: Ask anything — paste a URL and I'll read it 🔗
changeLanguageDesc: Select your preferred language. Language changes will apply to the entire platform.
toastSelectCourseRoadmap: Please select a Course or a Roadmap
courseSelectionHelp: * At least one Course or Roadmap must be selected. Members will learn and compete on the course/roadmap you pick here.
alreadyMember: You are already a member of this cohort!
personalizeClonedDesc: Customize how lessons, roadmaps, and mentors talk to you! This will build a bespoke curriculum tailored to your starting level.
joinClonedExplanation: 💡 Joining this cohort will automatically clone the required course and/or roadmap onto your personal account so you can learn and compete on the leaderboard!
emptyStateSub: Create one or join an existing group to get started.

detail.tailorQuestion: Is this cohort's content too easy or too hard for you?
detail.tailorDesc: You can regenerate a personalized course roadmap or node graph specifically designed for your experience level and background context.

deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{cohortName}}? This action is absolute and irreversible. All student progress metrics within this cohort will be deleted.
leaveConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to leave {{cohortName}}? Your scoped leaderboard rank will be removed, though your cloned courses and roadmaps will remain intact in your profile.

profile.noBio: This user has not set a bio yet.
profile.noDetails: No profile details could be retrieved.

customize.title: Customize Curriculum
customize.description: Regenerate the curriculum to match your specific background. This will replace the default course roadmap with a brand new, AI-personalized set of lessons. Your current progress on this curriculum will be reset to 0%.

profileSubtitle: Verify your developer presence and customize your learning identity.
bioPlaceholder: Share a bit about your engineering interests, goals, or coding experience...
badgesNote: Authentication is completed securely via official providers. No manual URL input is supported.
linkGithubFailed: Failed to link GitHub — check provider configuration
linkDiscordFailed: Failed to link Discord — check provider configuration
toastPasteFullKey: Please paste your full API key
toastKeyNotWorking: That key did not work — double-check you copied it fully
onboardingSubtitle: ZachCourse is completely free — you just need your own Gemini API key (also free, though some regions may require a billing account or profile to access the free tier). This unlocks unlimited personalized courses, roadmap generation, and mentor chats.
getFreeKeyDesc: Sign in with Google and click "Create API key". (Note: Depending on your region, Google AI Studio may require linking a billing account to verify your account, but the standard Tier is completely free of charge).
copyApiKey: Copy your API key (usually starts with AIzaSy or AQ.)
keyStoredSecurely: Your key stays securely in YOUR browser.
noAnalyticsDesc: Keep learning, chatting with your mentor, and taking quizzes to see your stats here! You don't have any certificates or analytics yet. Complete a course 100% to earn your first certificate.
toastNoCertificates: You don't have any certificates yet. Complete a course 100% to earn one! 🏆
toastViewCertificates: To view your certificates, open a completed course and go to its 'My Progress' tab! 🏆
welcome_desc: A quick intro to the platform.
course-views_desc: How to use a generated course.
desc: Revisit any part of the app walkthrough. Select a chapter below to begin your guided tour.
createOrSelectCourseToast: Please create or select a course first to view this tour.
pleaseWaitTranslatingCourse: Please wait while we convert your personalized learning course and modules to your chosen language.
